item.title: Of course they don’t “rule of law” people LOVE ut , but only when their strong guy does it to immigrants
item.description:
Of course they don’t “rule of law” people LOVE ut , but only when their strong guy does it to immigrants

item.title: Now of course, if anyone wants to do this, it would be horrible if they used things like mail.com or guerilla mail to hide who i...
item.description:
Now of course, if anyone wants to do this, it would be horrible if they used things like mail.com or guerilla mail to hide who is emailing them, and it would be really bad if they made sure they to put in the header the correct job, with a special made cover letter or resume for that job. These things are just so vulnerable.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: And this is despicable, but it’s been built up over years for them to wear this on their chest proudly
item.description:
And this is despicable, but it’s been built up over years for them to wear this on their chest proudly

item.title: People of all religions can be mobilised and people of all religions can be demonised - Mormonism particularly as an American cu...
item.description:
People of all religions can be mobilised and people of all religions can be demonised - Mormonism particularly as an American cult has a place in American imperialism that others don’t share, but I have met plenty of lovely Mormons and really have no interest in antagonising them, but rather in mobilising them in class consciousness#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
